title: Create docker-compose.local.yml — standalone local compose for agent-driven UAT
description: Create a standalone Docker Compose file `docker-compose.local.yml` for ephemeral local launch of the Categorizer service. Invoked with explicit `-f` flag (DEC-0018). Service `firefly-ai-categorizer`, port 3001:3000, HEALTHCHECK probes GET / (not /health), ENABLE_UI=true, restart:no, no Traefik labels.
notes: Per DEC-0018: no .override auto-merge risk. Per R-0023: service name firefly-ai-categorizer, port 3001→3000, health target GET /. No Traefik labels — direct port binding. No profiles — explicit -f is the seam.
